title: organization — published macros
description: One Blueprint macro. `Blueprint::organizationable()` adds the `organization_id` column + FK + index used by every table below Organization that needs to identify which brand owns the row (Branches, Teams, and future planned aggregates). Registered by OrganizationServiceProvider::boot() during framework boot so every downstream migration can call it regardless of priority ordering.
namespace_note: Blueprint macros extend `Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint`. Registered on the framework blueprint class — no organization dependency is added to consumers because Blueprint is a Laravel core class.

macros.name: Blueprint::organizationable

columns.name: organization_id
columns.description: FK to organizations.id. `nullable=false` (default) is the common case — every Branch belongs to exactly one Organization. `nullable=true` for aggregates that MAY be tenant-wide (rare).

indexes.description: Every table with organization_id needs this index — hot path for scoped-access + descendant queries.

foreign_keys.description: RESTRICT because deleting an Organization while descendants reference it is refused at the observer level. The FK is defense-in-depth.

macros.description: Adds the FK column + index + FK constraint used by tables that belong to an Organization. Pairs with the `BelongsToOrganization` trait on the model (composed AFTER `BelongsToTenant`).

companion.reference: See `traits.json` for the trait's global-scope + auto-fill behaviour.

macros.boot_order_note: Registered by OrganizationServiceProvider::boot(). Because Laravel loads every ServiceProvider's boot() before running any migration, the macro is available to every migration regardless of the organization module's priority (41).
